title: Ubiquiti UACC-PSU-27V-250W PSU for UISP-P-Pro
description: UACC-PSU-27V-250W is hot-swap power supply designed for UISP Power Professional . It provides power up to 250W. Output voltage is 27V , output current 9,3A It can be used as spare PSU or second PSU for increasing of UISP-P-Pro's output power up to 480W GPSR Technical support for this product is available on [email protected] email or sending a request via web form . Our technical support is available during this business hours
